Flow.description: Fluxo de Aluguer de Ferramentas para o portal de comunidades.
Flow.label: LM Aluguer Ferramentas - Portal

fields.name: Confirm_Cliente
fields.fieldText:
Informações do Cliente:

Nome: {!Current_Account.Name}

Email: {!Current_Account.E_mail_Empresa__c}

Telefone: {!Current_Account.Phone}

Morada: {!Current_Account.ShippingStreet}, {!Current_Account.ShippingCity}, {!Current_Account.ShippingCountry}

Código Postal: {!Current_Account.ShippingPostalCode}

NIF: {!Current_Account.NIF__c}

fields.name: Display_Total
fields.fieldText: TOTAL: {!Total_Order_Price}

fields.name: Title_Payment_Info
fields.fieldText: Dados de Pagamento

textTemplates.name: endFlowTemplate
textTemplates.text:
Pedido Criado!


Podes visualizar o pedido nº {!varOrder.OrderNumber} aqui
